description_long: This is a rectangular vending machine with a predominantly orange front panel featuring a large 'ONLY FANTAS' logo, stylized with a blue and white color scheme and a green leaf accent. The lower portion of the front panel displays a row of illustrated oranges, reinforcing the citrus beverage theme. On the right side of the front face, there is a vertical black section housing a display panel, product selection buttons, and a payment interface, all arranged in a compact, user-friendly layout. The sides of the machine are plain orange with a subtle bubble pattern and orange illustrations at the bottom, while the back is solid black. The top is flat and black, suitable for supporting small objects. The machine is constructed primarily from metal, with plastic and glass components for the interface and display areas.
description: A rectangular orange vending machine with 'ONLY FANTAS' branding, a product selection and payment panel on the front right, and illustrated oranges at the base.
description_view_0: The front view shows the 'ONLY FANTAS' logo, orange illustrations, and the full interactive panel with display, buttons, and payment interface on the right.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals a plain orange surface with a bubble pattern and orange illustrations at the bottom, with the interactive panel edge barely visible.
description_view_2: The rear view is entirely solid black, with no visible features or branding.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing a plain orange surface with a bubble pattern and orange illustrations at the bottom.
attribute_display_panel: A rectangular display panel is located on the upper right section of the front face, vertically oriented, with a dark background and illuminated indicator lights or labels.
attribute_payment_interface: A payment interface is present below the display panel on the right front, featuring a coin slot and bill acceptor, both vertically aligned.
attribute_product_selection_buttons: A vertical row of individual product selection buttons is located to the right of the display panel, each labeled with a different product option.
attribute_product_retrieval_slot: A wide, rectangular product retrieval slot is located at the bottom center of the front panel, with a dark flap or recessed opening.
attribute_branding_or_signage: A large 'ONLY FANTAS' logo with blue, white, and green colors is centered on the front, accompanied by illustrated oranges at the bottom and a subtle bubble pattern in the background.
